signal.title: Underscore AI raises $28M Series A for agentic bidding
signal.summary: Capital influx into LLM-based bidding agents suggests next-wave optimization stacks may bypass traditional DSP UI workflows.
signal.rawExcerpt: Underscore AI closed a $28M Series A to build autonomous media-buying agents that negotiate goals in natural language…
